task: Analyze the provided Git repository fixture and identify parser code related to missing async functions.

issue.title: Async functions disappear from parser symbol output
issue.body: Repositories with async Python endpoints parse successfully, but the parser's raw symbol list omits async functions before graph construction starts. Regular def functions from the same file are present.

comments.body: This started after the Python symbol collector was changed.

tools.name: list_repo_files
tools.description: List bounded Python files in the provided repository.

tools.name: search_repo_symbols
tools.description: Search Python functions/classes in the repository and rank them against issue evidence.

tools.name: search_repo_text
tools.description: Search code text for symptoms and output strings.

tools.name: read_repo_file
tools.description: Read bounded Python file contents from the repository.
